description: Otter.ai is a meeting transcription and conversation intelligence service that records, transcribes, summarizes, and analyzes meetings and conversations. Its product includes workspace, channel, and conversation data with AI-generated summaries, action items, and insights.
summary: Otter.ai exposes an authenticated Enterprise REST API at https://api.otter.ai/v1 using bearer API keys, plus an OAuth-protected MCP server at https://mcp.otter.ai/mcp over streamable HTTP.
